mapper.select: SELECT g.id AS group_id, g.name, g.description, gm.role, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM group_members counted_member WHERE counted_member.group_id = g.id) AS member_count, g.created_at FROM group_members gm JOIN study_groups g ON g.id = gm.group_id WHERE gm.user_id = #{userId} AND g.enabled = TRUE ORDER BY g.created_at DESC, g.id DESC

SELECT g.id AS group_id, g.name, g.description, gm.role, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM group_members counted_member WHERE counted_member.group_id = g.id) AS member_count, g.created_at FROM group_members gm JOIN study_groups g ON g.id = gm.group_id WHERE g.id = #{groupId} AND gm.user_id = #{userId} AND g.enabled = TRUE

SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.display_name, gm.role, gm.joined_at FROM group_members gm JOIN app_users u ON u.id = gm.user_id WHERE gm.group_id = #{groupId} AND u.enabled = TRUE ORDER BY CASE gm.role WHEN 'OWNER' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, gm.joined_at, u.id

SELECT gi.id AS invite_id, gi.group_id, gi.expires_at, gi.max_uses, gi.used_count FROM group_invites gi JOIN study_groups g ON g.id = gi.group_id WHERE gi.code_hash = #{codeHash} AND gi.enabled = TRUE AND g.enabled = TRUE FOR UPDATE OF gi
mapper.update: UPDATE group_invites SET enabled = FALSE WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND enabled = TRUE
UPDATE group_invites SET used_count = used_count + 1, enabled = CASE WHEN max_uses IS NOT NULL AND used_count + 1 >= max_uses THEN FALSE ELSE enabled END WHERE id = #{inviteId} AND enabled = TRUE
